channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Pothole outside Priestfield Watts Lane, 22nd April
item.description:
This may be a duplicate report as it appears it may have been reported in January. If it is, please can you expedite the repair? If it isn’t, please add to your list to fix. Thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Watts Lane, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped on chase side green, 22nd April
item.description:
Three large rubbish sacks dumped on green opposite St Michaels. Has been opened and is a health hazard

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Chase Side, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree blocking path, 22nd April
item.description:
See photo

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lockesley Drive, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip, 22nd April
item.description:
Please remove flytip on the grass area by steyning grove.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wayside Grove, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Old toilet left on Banbury road, e9, 22nd April
item.description:
Fly tipping (again) on Banbury road e9

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Penshurst Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A Fly-tip Large - More than 10 black bags problem has been found, 22nd April
item.description:
A Fly-tip Large - More than 10 black bags problem has been found by Brent Council

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Malvern Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load (Estates)

item.title: Lots of litter, 22nd April
item.description:
Please can the flowerbed/grass verge at the top of Plawsfield Rd/Beckenham Rd get a clear up? Lots of litter.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Plawsfield Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Shopping trolley dumped, 22nd April
item.description:
Shopping trolley (Sainsbury's?) next to brick wall of railway bridge, Green Lane

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Green Lane, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress and boxes flytipped, 22nd April
item.description:
There's a double mattress and two large boxes dumped in the paved area by the railway bridge on Green Lane. Regular flytipping hotspot.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Green Lane, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Black bags, 22nd April
item.description:
Someone has flytipped 2 black bags of rubbish by the bin in Bristow/pickford end and if they are not collected as a matter of urgency the foxes will rip them open and scatter the rubbush all over the pavement road and grass area .please can these bags be collected urgently
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bristow Road, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog fouling inside children’s park, 22nd April
item.description:
There are poop inside clapton sq where kids play. Needs to be urgently cleaned up before any kid picks it up or steps on it.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Clapton Square, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping in private bins, 22nd April
item.description:
We keep finding trash deposited in our compost bins (today, 22/04, there was a large takeout bag on top of our compost) and dog bags in our recycling. This is happening on a recurrent basis and it is a problem for us to decontaminate the bins every time before collection. We have cameras (Ring doorbell) and will check whether they recorded the offender. Please help install cameras in the area. We see people urinating in the street on the weekends , dog excrements on every street and people contaminating private bins because they happen to pass by houses.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Romero Square, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hedge blocking pavement., 22nd April
item.description:
Obstructs view of oncoming foot traffic and road traffic. Obstructs pavement particularly for people in wheelchairs or pushing prams.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3, Hillsboro Road, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pot hole been here for ages and getting worse!, 22nd April
item.description:
Large pot hole been here for ages and getting worse!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Towncourt Lane, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Garden waste fridge/freezer blocking pavement making residents walk in the road. Also requesting a street sweep., 22nd April
item.description:
Garden waste fridge/freezer blocking pavement making residents walk in the road. Also requesting a street sweep.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mulberry Way, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sign post has fallen, large hole in pavement causing significant trip hazard, 22nd April
item.description:
Sign post fell about 2 weeks ago, the sign post is lain on the pavement however there’s a large hole in the pavement which would cause serious injury if not seen, particularly hazardous at night or to elderly or persons with sight disability.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 12, Lant Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
Tree is blocking the pavement outside County House

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 128-136, Beckenham Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken sign, 22nd April
item.description:
Broken sign

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 32, High Street, Widmore, Greater London

item.title: Graffiti, 22nd April
item.description:
This is getting worse. Started with the R and is now accelerating.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Drakefell Road, Brockley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Black bags on pavement, boards on pavement, mattress propped up against wall on pathway, 22nd April
item.description:
The black bags have been here for 2 weeks and the board and mattress since yesterday. The mattress is propped up against a wall where there is a pathway to the park.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lipton Close, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet
